query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `employee_sessions` (`id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `employee_id` bigint NOT NULL, `token` varchar(256) NOT NULL, `expires_at` datetime NOT NULL, `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `employee_sessions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `employee_sessions_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`))
